nasb.text: The Lord has sworn and will not change His mind, “You are a priest forever According to the order of Melchizedek.”

esv.text: The Lord has sworn and will not change his mind, “You are a priest forever after the order of Melchizedek.”

cnv.text: 耶和華起了誓，就決不反悔； 他說：“你永遠作祭司， 是照著麥基洗德的體系。”

ccb.text: 耶和华起了誓，永不反悔， 祂说：“你照麦基洗德的模式永远做祭司。”

csbs.text: 耶和华起了誓，绝不后悔； 他说：“你是照着麦基洗德的等级， 永远作祭司。”
